product_name: Infor OS API Gateway / ION APIs

buyer_guidance: Use this API family for ERP record synchronization and business transaction writeback rather than asset or telemetry ingestion. Infor should be treated as a rest api surface for erp records and transaction workflows.

Writeback is Supported.

This row is modeled as erp records and transaction workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
